summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mud Patch Garment Reusability AI Engine MVP. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with 100% success rate.

Admin dashboard with all tabs (Formula, Brands, Categories) functional
Formula weights sliders adjustable and saveable

success_percentage: Backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components functional)
